steps.title: Identify the sample and its source
steps.content:
• The survey sampled history professors.
  • These professors were selected at random from the California State Universities system.

steps.title: Determine the appropriate population for generalization
steps.content:
• Results from a random sample can be generalized to the population from which the sample was drawn.
  • Since the sample was history professors from all CSU campuses, the largest population to which the results apply is all history professors at all California State Universities.
That is the correct answer.
